$comment: EXAMPLE / TEMPLATE — not the live claim. When you publish Aefos on PubPascal, the portal generates the real manifest; save it as .well-known/pubpascal.json (drop the .example) with the real 'verify' nonce it gives you. This file is in a PUBLIC repo, so it must contain NO secrets — only public identifiers. Ownership is proven by the fact that only someone with write access to this repo can commit the file with the matching nonce.
